about.title: Transform Payroll into a Smart Solution
about.description: The LiberPay Salary Card is the innovative solution that simplifies payment management and brings more financial freedom to your employees. With a 100% digital, agile, and secure process, your company gains efficiency and your staff have instant access to their salary, with multiple features and exclusive benefits.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Payroll in just three simple steps

step1.title: Registration and Request
step1.description: Your company partners with LiberPay, and employees or HR can register via the app, the HR portal, or by spreadsheet. The virtual card is generated automatically, and the physical card can be requested if needed.

step2.title: Payment Management
step2.description: Payroll is sent via API or the LiberPay platform. The total amount is transferred to an escrow account and instantly distributed to each employee.

step3.title: Instant Deposit
step3.description: The salary is CREDITED directly to the card on the date set by the employer, and the employee receives a notification in the app confirming the payment.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: LiberPay LLC ("we", "our", or "LiberPay") provides a private platform for managing employee payments and issuing cards for companies and their collaborators.
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect personal information when individuals ("Users") use our services.

sections.title: 2. Scope
bullets: Employees and contractors who receive payments through LiberPay
Representatives of companies ("Clients") that use LiberPay
Users of our website, applications, and APIs

sections.title: 3. Information We Collect
paragraphs: We may collect the following categories of personal data:

subsections.title: e) Sensitive Personal Data
bullets: When necessary, data for identity verification (e.g., documents or biometric verification)

sections.title: 4. How We Use Information
paragraphs: We do not use personal data for unrelated purposes without prior notice.
bullets: Operate and provide our payment and card services
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations

sections.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
paragraphs: Depending on the context, we process data based on:
bullets: Performance of a contract (e.g., payment processing)

sections.title: 6. Information Sharing
paragraphs: We may share personal data with:
We do not sell personal data.
bullets: Regulatory or legal authorities, when required

sections.title: 7. Privacy Rights (California - CCPA/CPRA)
paragraphs: If you are a California resident, you have the right to:
bullets: Request access to your personal data
Limit the use of sensitive data
Opt out of the sale or sharing of data (note: we do not sell data)
To exercise your rights, contact us:

sections.title: 8. Data Retention
paragraphs: We keep personal data only for as long as necessary to:
Retention periods may vary according to regulatory requirements.

sections.title: 9. Information Security
paragraphs: We adopt reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect data, including:
However, no system is completely secure.
bullets: Encryption in transit and at rest

sections.title: 10. International Data Transfers
paragraphs: Information may be processed and stored in the United States and in other countries where our partners operate.

sections.title: 11. Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Our services are not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Policy periodically. The most recent version will always be available with the updated effective date.

sections.title: 13. Contact
paragraphs: For questions or requests related to this Policy:
